name: Diesel Brothers
overview: Following the team at Dieselsellerz as they trick out trucks, work hard and play harder in the process. In the world of diesel vehicles, no one has more fun or builds bigger, badder trucks than Heavy D, Diesel Dave and their crew. Their mega builds and awesome truck giveaways are the stuff of diesel legend.

trailers.title: Will This Performance Diesel Hold Up on the Track? | Diesel Brothers
